findings.evidence: TypographyVariant.Opinion.Xl resolves to theme.type.display.lg instead of typography.opinion.xl / Newsreader. Generated LaneShadowThemeValues exposes type.label/body/title/heading/display only, with no typography.opinion/ui/instrument family API or fontFamily fields.
findings.fix: Expose the UC-TOK-01 typography family tokens in the active Android theme and map TypographyVariant.Opinion.Xl to typography.opinion.xl with Newsreader font family, exact fontSize, lineHeight, weight, and other declared font attributes.

findings.evidence: TypographyVariant.Ui.Body.Md resolves to theme.type.body.md instead of typography.ui.body.md / Geist. The required Geist family resolution is not implemented.
findings.fix: Map UI variants to typography.ui.* token styles backed by the generated theme and bundled Geist font assets.

findings.evidence: TypographyVariant.Instrument.Lg synthesizes theme.type.title.lg.copy(fontWeight = theme.type.label.lg.fontWeight) instead of resolving typography.instrument.lg / JetBrains Mono.
findings.fix: Map instrument variants to typography.instrument.* token styles backed by JetBrains Mono and token-declared size, lineHeight, weight, and numeric settings.

findings.evidence: The required AC-1, AC-2, and AC-3 test functions are annotated @Ignore, so the primary behavioral tests are skipped.
findings.fix: Remove @Ignore and make each test assert the actual token-resolved font family, fontSize, lineHeight, weight, and relevant attributes.

findings.evidence: ContentColor.resolve suppresses UNUSED_PARAMETER and ignores the active LaneShadowThemeValues, returning static generated LaneShadowTheme.color.Content values. This does not prove light and dark resolution through the current theme.
findings.fix: Resolve ContentColor from the active theme values for both light and dark modes, then assert ContentColor.Secondary against color.content.secondary in both modes.

findings.evidence: Required gates are not satisfied: implementer handoff says connectedDebugAndroidTest was not run, detekt is unavailable, and assembleRelease plus the exact app-release.apk sandbox-symbol gate was not run. In this read-only review, Gradle failed before execution with Operation not permitted on the Gradle wrapper lock file.
findings.fix: Run the required gates in a writable Android environment: :app:testDebugUnitTest, :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest, :app:compileDebugKotlin, detekt or the configured lint equivalent, and :app:assembleRelease with the com.nativesandbox APK inspection.

requirements.evidence: TypographyVariant.Opinion.Xl maps to theme.type.display.lg at TypographyVariant.kt:20; LSTextTest.opinion_xl_resolves_newsreader_token is @Ignore at LSTextTest.kt:14.
requirements.remediation: Implement typography.opinion.xl / Newsreader resolution and enable the AC-1 test.

requirements.evidence: TypographyVariant.Ui.Body.Md maps to theme.type.body.md at TypographyVariant.kt:82; LSTextTest.ui_body_md_resolves_geist_token is @Ignore at LSTextTest.kt:26.
requirements.remediation: Implement typography.ui.body.md / Geist resolution and enable the AC-2 test.

requirements.evidence: TypographyVariant.Instrument.Lg maps to theme.type.title.lg.copy(...) at TypographyVariant.kt:129-130; LSTextTest.instrument_lg_resolves_mono_token is @Ignore at LSTextTest.kt:38.
requirements.remediation: Implement typography.instrument.lg / JetBrains Mono resolution and enable the AC-3 test.

requirements.evidence: LSTextInstrumentationTest.font_scale_propagates_to_rendered_size exists, but connectedDebugAndroidTest was not run; reviewer Gradle execution was blocked by read-only filesystem lock-file failure.
requirements.remediation: Run and pass the required connectedDebugAndroidTest gate on an emulator or device.

requirements.evidence: ContentColor.resolve ignores its LaneShadowThemeValues parameter at ContentColor.kt:16 and returns static LaneShadowTheme.color.Content values.
requirements.remediation: Resolve colors from the active theme and test both light and dark ContentColor.Secondary behavior.

requirements.evidence: LSText signature uses color: ContentColor = ContentColor.Primary at LSText.kt:12, and the reflective test checks no Color parameter at LSTextTest.kt:67-83.
LSTextStories.kt defines id atoms.text.swatch with ComponentTier.Atom, and AtomsStories.all includes LSTextStories.all.
Forbidden literal grep gate on LSText.kt returned exit 0 with no FontFamily.*, Color(0x...), Material Icons, or Icons.Filled/Outlined matches.
The required assembleRelease plus exact app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk inspection gate was not run; only an existing app-release-unsigned.apk artifact was inspectable.
requirements.remediation: Run :app:assembleRelease and verify the produced release APK has exactly zero com.nativesandbox entries.

summary: NEEDS_FIXES: the core typography family requirements remain unimplemented and their tests are skipped; content color does not resolve through the active theme, and required Android validation gates are not satisfied.
